[general] png&w=3840&q=75) #### Sakalwara Community Mental Health Centre Sakalwara Community Mental Health Centre (SCMHC) in Anekal taluk is the hub of all community mental health activities. Community psychiatry services are delivered by a multidisciplinary team consisting of psychiatrists, psychiatric nursing, psychiatric social work, clinical psychology, and vocational trainers.

[general] The centre has expanded its horizon to offer resource building, training and telemedicine services. ![](https://www.nimhans.ac.in/_next/image?url=%2Fhome%2Farrow-left.png&w=48&q=75)![](https://www.nimhans.ac.in/home/arrow-right-black.svg) ![j](https://www.nimhans.ac.in/_next/image?url=%2Fhome%2Fsakalawara.png&w=640&q=75) Sakalwara Community Mental Health Centre ![j](https://www.nimhans.ac.

NIMHANS is world-renowned as a centre for mental health, neurosciences and allied fields.

[general] The vision of NIMHANS is to be a world leader in these areas and to evolve state of the art approaches to patient care through translational research.
